theoremName: augmented trace quotient limsup consequence theorem
statement: The augmented trace quotient limsup theorem supplies the quotient upper-bound consequence needed by the two-sided quotient bounds theorem.

proof: Import the augmented trace quotient limsup theorem.
Extract the trace quotient upper-bound conclusion.
Expose only that consequence to the two-sided quotient bounds theorem.
